connect.title: Your Memory
connect.subtitle: Enter your memory space
connect.remember_login: Keep me signed in for 15 days
connect.security: Space ID is your private key. Do not share it with others.

error.invalid: Cannot access this space. Please check your ID and try again.

connect.how_1: Your agent accumulates memories during conversations
connect.how_2: You can also ask your agent to remember specific things
connect.how_3: This dashboard shows what has been saved

audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: Review recent dashboard and API operations, then export them for offline analysis.

search.placeholder: Search your memories — try natural language…
search.no_results_hint: Try different words, or clear the search to see all

add.title: Add a memory
add.prompt: What do you want your agent to remember?
add.footer: This memory will be marked as "Manually Saved"

delete.title: Delete this memory?
delete.warning: Once deleted, your agent will no longer remember this.

empty.title: This space has no memories yet
empty.description: Memories are accumulated as you chat with your agent. You can also save the first one now.

info.pinned: "Manually Saved" are things you explicitly asked your agent to remember
info.insight: "Auto Learned" are memories AI automatically extracted from conversations
info.note: What you see here are saved memories, not the reasoning behind each response

export.title: Export memories
export.description: Download all active memories to your device. The file is in JSON format.
export.note: The export includes all active memories regardless of filters. Original timestamps are preserved.

import.title: Import memories
import.description: Upload a previously exported memory file (JSON format) to add memories to this space.
import.note: Imported memories will be processed in the background. Original timestamps may not be preserved.
import.success: File uploaded. Memories are being imported.

facet_desc.preferences: Tools, styles & how you like things done
facet_desc.experiences: Events and stories you've been through

analysis.title: Memory Analysis
analysis.taxonomy_warning: Taxonomy is unavailable right now. Showing local fallback labels.
analysis.processed_hint: Processed counts are based on unique memories after duplicate collapse, so they may be lower than total memories.
analysis.loading_source: Preparing memories in the current range…
analysis.empty: No memories to analyze in the current time range.
analysis.top_topics_hint: Topic counts are aggregate analysis signals and are not clickable filters.
analysis.retrying_updates: Update polling failed. Retrying with backoff…
analysis.degraded_body: The live analysis service is currently returning server errors. Your memory list still works normally, and you can retry later.
analysis.stalled_body: This analysis run stopped making progress while polling for updates. Retry to start a fresh run.
analysis.failed_body: This analysis run did not complete. You can start it again later.

memory_pulse.title: Memory Pulse
memory_pulse.subtitle: A quiet read on how this space has been evolving lately.

rhythm.title: Rhythm
rhythm.caption: Recent memory activity across the current range
rhythm.helper: Click a bar to filter memories by when they were created.
rhythm.selected_hint: Timeline filter is active. Click the same bar again or clear it here.
rhythm.empty: Not enough activity to draw a pulse yet.

signals.title: Signal Stack
signals.caption: Recurring tags that keep surfacing in this range

memory_insight.layer_helper: Keep the browse map for drill-down, or switch to the entity network for relationship signals.
memory_insight.title: Memory Insight
memory_insight.subtitle: Explore how categories, tags, entities, and memories connect inside this range.
memory_insight.helper: Drag bubbles and tags to arrange the map. Click any bubble to send it to the right side of the canvas, then walk its tags, entities, and memories without leaving this single view.
memory_insight.canvas_hint: One shared canvas. Scroll both directions if needed.
memory_insight.pan_hint: Hold Space and drag the background to pan
memory_insight.empty_entities: No entity heuristics surfaced under this tag yet.

relations.title: Relationship Layer
relations.subtitle: See which high-frequency entities cluster together, bridge topics, and grow over time.
relations.helper: The graph is built locally from co-occurrence, tags, categories, and recency inside the current range.
relations.canvas_global: Global entity network. Drag nodes, filter edges, and focus on the strongest links.
relations.canvas_focus: Focused neighborhood. Expand to 2-hop when you want more context.
relations.empty_body: Try a broader range or remove page-level category/tag filters to surface more shared entities.
relations.overview_helper: Pick a node or edge for local evidence, or start from the ranked summaries below.
